name: Ham & Corn Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in drippings until tender.
2. Beat eggs in a bowl; add milk, ham, corn, parsley, and seasonings.
3. Stir in onions.
4. Pour mixture into a buttered 1-quart casserole.
5. Bake in preheated oven at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes, or until custard is firm.
